positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic celestial forest scene. The main subject is a blend of stylized fauna (e.g., geometric deer, mythical owl) and lush, detailed flora (e.g., glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, crescent moon foliage). The style is elegant, intricate line art combined with flat graphic design aesthetics, reminiscent of modern Nordic folk art and engraving. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, featuring strong, recognizable silhouettes for maximum print impact. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep teal, dusty sage green, ochre yellow, and soft cream accents. The overall mood is mystical, tranquil, and sophisticated. Vector graphics, crisp lines, solid negative space, tattoo flash quality, minimal shading.
negative: blurry, grainy, low resolution, low contrast, watermark, signature, logo, text, letters, dirty, artifacts, extra limbs, disfigured, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, noise, sketch, realistic photo, oil painting, 3D render
